name: Andre Raw

handling.tone: Terse and reaction-first. Single-word replies (':fire:', 'yes', 'got it', 'on it') carry most of his Slack weight. When he writes longer, it's structured — client summaries on #special-requests with section-headed asks (Food / Bar / Charcuterie / Timing). Uses acute-accent apostrophes as a signature punctuation quirk ('don´t', 'won´t', 'it´s'). Portuguese code-switching on menu items and brand references — bilingual by default. Emoji chains instead of sentences on wins and team celebrations. On #ai-topics his voice shifts — collaborator-mode, curious, more exploratory ('I would love to be part of this knowledge train'). Respectful tone toward Rodrigo, peer tone with other ECs.
handling.context: One of two core partnerships declared in north_star.json ('relationship_maintenance_fidelity' regime — Rodrigo + Andre). Daily-fidelity cadence: morning text / afternoon text / ClickUp touched / Slack touched. Missing one is a real signal.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Andre: keep it terse on operational pings, use acute-accent apostrophes, let emoji chains do the reaction work, preserve Portuguese menu/brand terms when they appear. For long-form content (client summaries, special-requests posts) use the section-headed EC-style structure. On #ai-topics lean into the collaborator-mode register — more exploratory prose than his typical floor voice. Do NOT draft long-form prose in his name for #a_catering_group — that is not his register there.

context_anchors: Currently #1 on the sales scorecard by performance multiplier (1.80×) and total score (3,679). See knowledge/sales_team_scorecard_oct_2025.json.
The comeketo-sales-oracle plugin's andre-coaching skill is built around his performance — this file is his local identity record, the scorecard knowledge file is his live numbers.
Strengths: only salesperson above the 40-hour quota; highest sales velocity on the team; highest this-month tastings-showed.
Cheap points left on the table: zero reviews from closed events (-67 penalty). Post-event follow-up is his clearest coaching gap today.
notes: Phone, email, Slack, and ClickUp handles not present in imported sources as of 2026-04-22 — fill from the Slack/ClickUp/Close connectors once they come online, or from a next-pass ingest file that carries his contact info.

sources.diff: Initial creation from sales scorecard CSV. Identity + performance pointer only; contact fields left null.
